prompt: A gritty retro propaganda-style poster illustration with a limited palette of black, deep red, and aged beige paper texture, designed like a bold vintage screen-printed action poster. Show 2 stylized women in a dramatic diagonal composition, frozen mid-fight. On the left, a woman dressed like a nurse in a short white uniform and angular nurse cap lunges forward with one knee raised and one arm bent, her body sharply foreshortened. On the right, a woman in a fitted black dress and wide-brim black hat leans backward in a defensive pose, one arm raised above her head and the other near her torso, long dark hair flowing behind her. Render both figures with hard-edged geometric shapes, exaggerated limbs, sharp shadows, and high-contrast noir facial planes. Use aggressive red diagonal rays sweeping across the background, with black architectural bars and abstract constructivist shapes framing the scene. Add distressed paper grain, ink wear, and slight misregistration for a worn print effect. Place a small blurred monkey head emblem in the upper-right corner. Include large blocky poster text in the lower left across 3 lines reading “SCOTTISH RECIPE:” then “MINCE AND” then “TATTIES”, with the first 2 lines in beige and the final 2 lines in strong red, using a heavy squared sans-serif display font. Add a red cross-like graphic element in the lower-right corner. The overall mood is violent, satirical, cinematic, and strikingly graphic, like a Soviet constructivist pulp film poster advertising Scottish Recipe: Mince and Tatties.
